prompt: Run a full IDFA compliance audit on this model. I want to know if it passes all four guardrails.
assertions: Reports status for Guardrail 1 (Named Range Priority) — should be PASS for this model
Reports status for Guardrail 2 (LaTeX Verification) — PASS or WARN (no complex formulas like WACC)
Reports status for Guardrail 3 (Intent Notes) — should reflect comment coverage
Reports status for Guardrail 4 (Layer Isolation) — should be PASS (no hardcoded values)
Explains what each guardrail checks in terms the user can understand
